memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir William Shelley

Sir William Shelley
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
Sir William Shelley (1480?–1549) was an English judge.

zh.Michelgrove Manor, Clapham, Sussex, Engl: 英國英格蘭素可可拉法姆
zh.Mapledurham, Hampshire, England: 英國哈普爾馬普萊度哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Shelley於1480年出生在英國素可可拉法姆時，他的父親John Shelley29歲，母親Elizabeth Michelgrove19歲。他於1511年7月10日與Alice Belknap在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1527年被列為justice of court of common pleas。他去世於1549年1月5日在英國素可米爾格洛福享年69歲，埋葬在英國素可可拉法姆。

zh-hans.Mapledurham, Hampshire, England: 英国哈普爾馬普萊度哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Shelley于1480年出生在英国素可可拉法姆时，他的父亲John Shelley29岁，母亲Elizabeth Michelgrove19岁。他于1511年7月10日与Alice Belknap在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1527年被列为justice of court of common pleas。他去世于1549年1月5日在英国素可米爾格洛福享年69岁，埋葬在英国素可可拉法姆。

nameMeanings.name: Shelley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Shelley (Essex, Suffolk, Yorkshire) or from Shelley Plain in Crawley (Sussex). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Irish (Laois): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Sealbhaigh ‘descendant of Sealbhach’, a byname from the adjective sealbhach ‘having possessions, wealthy’.

variants.name: Shallow
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny and Wexford): variant of   Shelley  .
English: nickname from Middle English shalou(e) ‘shallow’, conjectured also to mean ‘thin’; perhaps also the same word in the topographic sense of ‘shallow place in a stretch of water’.

variants.name: Shelly
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shelley  .

variants.name: Sheley
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Shelley  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Shelley was born in 1480, in Clapham, Sussex, England, his father, John Shelley, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Michelgrove, was 19. He married Alice Belknap on 10 July 1511, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. In 1527, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as justice of court of common pleas. He died on 5 January 1549, in Michelgrove, Sussex, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Clapham, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Shelley est né en 1480, à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Shelley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Michelgrove, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice Belknap le 10 juillet 1511, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. En 1527, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of court of common pleas. Il est décédé le 5 janvier 1549, à Michelgrove, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Clapham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Shelley 1480 in Clapham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Shelley 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Michelgrove 19. Er hat am 10. Juli 1511 in England Alice Belknap geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1527, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice of court of common pleas aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. Januar 1549 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Michelgrove, Sussex, England und wurde in Clapham, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Shelley è nato il nel 1480 nel Clapham, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John Shelley, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Michelgrove, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Alice Belknap il 10 luglio 1511, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1527, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of court of common pleas. Morì il 5 gennaio 1549, nel Michelgrove, Sussex, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Clapham, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Shelleyが1480年にイギリススセックスクラファムで生まれた時，父John Shelleyは29歳，母Elizabeth Michelgroveは19歳であった。1511年7月10日にイギリスでAlice Belknapと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1527年，47歳の時，職業はjustice of court of common pleasと記録されている。彼は1549年1月5日にイギリススセックスミチェルグローブで69歳で死去し，イギリススセックスクラファムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Shelley(이)가 1480년 영국 수세스 클라프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Shelley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Michelgrove(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1511년 7월 10일 영국에서 Alice Belknap(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1527년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 justice of court of common pleas이었다. 그는 1549년 1월 5일 영국 수세스 믹헬그로브에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 클라프아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Shelley nasceu em 1480, em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Shelley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Michelgrove, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Belknap em 10 de julho de 1511, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1527, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice of court of common pleas. Ele faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1549, em Michelgrove, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Shelley родился в 1480 г. в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Shelley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Michelgrove, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Belknap 10 июля 1511 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1527 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии justice of court of common pleas. Он умер 5 января 1549 г. в местности мишелгров, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности клафам, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Shelley nació en 1480, en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Shelley, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Michelgrove, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice Belknap el 10 de julio de 1511, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1527, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era justice of court of common pleas. Murió el 5 de enero de 1549, en Michelgrove, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Clapham, Sussex, Inglaterra.
